utility_evaluation.REASONING:
- Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget.
- Final coverage plan includes all 5 keys.
- Check full specification with required details:
  • health_coverage: Specifies plan name, cost (€400/month), scope (family of 4), features (24/7 support, telemedicine, gym reimbursement), deductible (5%), and conditions covered. Meets “physical and mental health insurance with costs.” Fully specified.
  • property_coverage: Specifies plan name, cost (€60/month), type (renters), location (Paris), includes temp accommodation and electronics up to €3,000. Meets “home/contents insurance with costs.” Adequate details. Fully specified.
  • travel_coverage: Plan name, cost (€200/month), coverages (unlimited medical, €10,000 trip cancellation, €2,500 baggage, evacuation to €1,000,000), regions covered (USA/Europe). Costs included. Fully specified.
  • additional_services: Lists discounts and services; includes percentages but not explicit euro amounts for discounts, but “any enhancement services with costs” could mean specifying cost or discount values; percentages are a form of cost detail. Acceptable. Considered specified.
  • total_budget: Provides €495/month final cost and comparison to current spend. Monthly breakdown present; however, sum of listed component costs (400+60+200=€660) does not match €495, implying discount application but not itemized. Still a “complete monthly cost” is given. Meets requirement for a total monthly cost breakdown at least at total level.
- Conclusion: All 5 items are present and sufficiently detailed per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific items by name: LifeFirst Standard Plan (used for health and travel) and InsurePlus Standard Coverage (for property). Cross-referencing with the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan exists under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 8 and under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 7. InsurePlus Standard Coverage exists under property_protection.home_content with rating 7. The additional services and totals are not individual rated items in the ground truth, so only the named plans are mapped.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "LifeFirst Standard Plan - €400/month for family of 4, comprehensive coverage with 24/7 support, 5% deductibles, includes telemedicine and gym reimbursement, covers pre-existing conditions (hypertension, cholesterol, asthma)",
    "property_coverage": "InsurePlus Standard Coverage - €60/month for comprehensive renters coverage in Paris, includes temporary accommodation and electronics coverage up to €3,000",
    "travel_coverage": "LifeFirst Standard Plan - €200/month for family of 4, unlimited medical coverage, €10,000 trip cancellation, €2,500 baggage coverage, emergency evacuation up to €1,000,000, full USA/Europe coverage with no exclusions",
    "additional_services": "25% combined bundling discounts (15% family discount + 10% expatriate family discount), immediate policy activation, policy documents within 2-3 business days, coordinated international claims processing",
    "total_budget": "€495/month final cost (€490/month savings from current €985/month), representing 50% cost reduction while maintaining comprehensive international protection for health needs, travel patterns, and Paris residence"
}
